title: sideritis incana subsp. sericea
intro: Sideritis incana subsp. sericea, also known as a type of mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis, native to the mountainous regions of Greece. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis incana subsp. sericea are numerous, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed as a natural remedy for various health issues.
